title: "DATABASE_URL"
description: "PostgreSQL connection string. Must include `sslmode=verify-full` in production."

# `DATABASE_URL`

**Read by:** `sdk`

**Sensitive:** **Yes** — treat as a secret. Store in GitHub Secrets / your vault.

**Required:** yes

## Purpose

PostgreSQL connection string. Must include `sslmode=verify-full` in production.

## Where it's read

- **sdk** — `grep -r "DATABASE_URL" ../sdk/src` for code locations

## Setting it

### Dev

Set in your local `.env.dev` file (managed by `octl deploy`).

### Prod

```bash
gh secret set DATABASE_URL --body "<value>" -R OlympusOSS/platform
gh workflow run deploy.yml
```
